infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ALiN Move needs your location to show nearby delivery jobs and provide navigation.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: ALiN Move needs your location to track deliveries in progress.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ALiN Move needs camera access for proof of delivery photos and document uploads.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: ALiN Move needs your location to track deliveries in progress.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: ALiN Move needs your location to show nearby delivery jobs.

plugins.cameraPermission: ALiN Move needs camera for proof of delivery photos.

plugins.photosPermission: ALiN Move needs photo access for document uploads.
